I used this bag for my cellphone and other important hiking stuff. It's lightweight and has many pockets for multiple storage. I love its mini handle. This can also be used for non-hiking events. Thank you decathlon!

Vanjski dzepic sa zatvaračem čičkom dodatno za osiguranje željenog sadrzaja . Udobna je kod nošenja preko ramena , pojas ne nosim ali bi mi odgovaralo da postoji odgovarajući remen s patentom dovoljno širok da moze proci kroz one alke da mogu nositi oko struka.
Ovo je druga koju imam , cijena je prihvatljiva . Mozda jos neka svijetla , bez boja ne bi bila na odmet .

This bag has served me well throughout my travels. I used this bag to keep my toiletries and medicine all in one place. The bag has separate compartments, where I stored my loose coins, clips, harbingers, and Swiss Army knife.  So there it goes, one small bag but versatile to keep all the odds and ends in one safe place.

Très content de mon achat. Léger, et pratique, attache ceinture bien pensée.
Je l'utiliserai en rando/ trekking, mais pour le quotidien, je l'utilise notamment pour des tournages, pour y stocker du petit matériel technique. Sans la sangle, portée à la ceinture, cette sacoche vient compléter d'autres équipements.
Les différents espaces de rangements sont pratiques et bien placés.
Suite à une première expérience satisfzisante avec cette même saccoche, j'en ai offert une nouvelle à un proche .

"This is the ideal weekender bag. It fits a couple of changes of clothes, toiletries, and even an extra pair of shoes without bulging at the seams. I took it on a bus trip recently and it fit perfectly in the rack. The shoulder strap is padded and comfortable, even when the bag is fully packed. Highly recommend for the price!"
